articles.description: Liverpool's exit from the Champions League was hastened by a VAR intervention. BBC Sport analyses the key refereeing decisions in their season.
articles.title: Liverpool: Arne Slot says VAR has gone against his side this season - is he right?

articles.description: With Vincent Kompany making an impressive impact at Bayern Munich, BBC Sport's tactics expert Umir Irfan takes a closer look at the manager's unique style.
articles.title: Is Vincent Kompany providing a glimpse into football after Pep Guardiola?

articles.title: Europa League: Unai Emery and Vítor Pereira to speak before Aston Villa v Bologna and Nottingham Forest v Porto

articles.description: BBC Sport explores John Terry's imminent takeover of Colchester, why ex-pros are buying clubs, and what the feeling is among fans
articles.title: John Terry Colchester takeover: What's in it for him?

articles.description: Barcelona's exit from the Champions League quarter-finals was "a robbery", says their forward Raphinha.
articles.title: Barcelona's Champions League exit was 'a robbery', says Raphinha

articles.description: England rugby star Ellie Kildunne reveals she suffered from disordered eating and body dysmorphia during the coronavirus lockdown.
articles.title: Ellie Kildunne: World Cup winner reveals disordered eating and body dysmorphia struggle

articles.description: BBC Sport examines whether it matters if Wrexham don't seal promotion to the Premier League this season at the first time of asking.
articles.title: Wrexham: Does it matter if Premier League chasers don't get promoted this season?

articles.description: Adam Wilkie, a marketing manager and the son of Olympic swimming champion David, is chasing his father's world record time in his memory.
articles.title: David Wilkie's son chasing his iconic world record time from 1976 Montreal Olympics

articles.description: Arne Slot's gamble to start Alexander Isak against PSG backfires with his own future also in the balance after a Champions League exit.
articles.title: Champions League: Arne Slot's Alexander Isak gamble backfires as Liverpool's silverware hopes end

articles.description: How can Sarina Wiegman get the best from one of England's most talented footballers, Lauren James?
articles.title: Lauren James: How can Sarina Wiegman and England get the best from talented forward?
